creator: marius@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Steven Hartland from comment #5)

Well, given that the fix has been upstreamed to illumos-gate, the question of whether it can be included into 10.3 now is just a matter of when that change is merged into FreeBSD head. The problem at least would justify instant MFC/MFS to stable/10 and releng/10.3 respectively for RC2, or actually doing the optional RC3 in the worst case.
